title: × koellikohleria rosea
intro: × Koellikohleria rosea, also known as the Hawaiian hibiscus or rose mallow, is a rare hybrid plant that belongs to the hibiscus family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection. × Koellikohleria rosea can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
